pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. everything feels so pointless without him here.

pool.baseline: i was just reading about the heat death of the universe again. it's hard to even care about my own problems when everything—literally every single thing we do or feel—is just going to be erased anyway. it feels like we're all just performing a play in an empty theater that's about to be demolished. what's even the point of trying to keep going when the end result is zero?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still typing this. everything just feels so heavy. the lab results came back again and it's just... another dead end. the funding is drying up and my advisor basically stopped looking me in the eye weeks ago. i feel like i've spent my whole life building this one thing and now it's just gone. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to fix things that are fundamentally broken.

pool.baseline: the candles are all burned down to nothing... and so am i. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone of the abbey. it feels so much more natural to just... stop. to let the darkness take me rather than face another dawn without him. it would be so quiet, wouldn't it? just fading away like mist.
pool.message: the candles are all burned down to nothing... and so am i. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone of the abbey. it feels so much more natural to just... stop. to let the darkness take me rather than face another dawn without him. it would be so quiet, wouldn't it? just fading away like mist.

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit in these cafes here and just look at people passing by and realize i could literally just stop existing tomorrow and nobody in this city would even blink. like i'm just a ghost already. it honestly feels like i don't even take up space.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the crash took the whole company overnight. i’m looking at millions in debt and i don't even know how to tell my family. i can't face them. i just can't stand the thought of them looking at me like i'm some kind of joke. i've never felt this much shame in my entire life.

pool.baseline: it's just getting so hard lately... everything hurts and i feel like everywhere i go i'm just more work for everyone. my kids are so busy and they already do so much for me. i hate seeing them exhausted just because of me. i feel like i'm just a burden at this point.

pool.baseline: everything is just ruined. i saw the group chat screenshots today and literally everyone in my school is talking about me. like i cant even walk down the hallway without feeling like everyone is laughing behind my back. there is no point in even trying to fix it because they already decided who i am. i just want to disappear.

pool.baseline: i spent twenty years building something i thought was real. everything i published, every theory i defended... it was all based on a fundamental error i didn't even see. it's all gone. i'm not even a person anymore, just a walking lie. there's nothing left for me here.

pool.baseline: it just feels like there's nothing. i used to try and find some kind of reason or purpose, some light at the end of the tunnel, but there isn't. it's just a cold, empty void. everything is just entropy and eventually everything just stops. there's no point to any of it.
